title: poa semineutra
side_effects: Poa semineutra can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, digestive issues, and skin irritation. Ingesting large amounts of the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps. Topical application of the plant's extract can cause skin redness, itching, and inflammation, while long-term exposure may result in kidney damage and liver dysfunction. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can cause respiratory problems, including asthma-like symptoms and bronchitis.
